{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322192503C055E5280AB371568983"}"},"total":14498},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7088718783564595999","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情流畅，难的没有乱七八糟的东西。即使主角有外挂，也没用牛逼到无敌情节，循循渐进还是比较合理的。当然我才后续肯定会写国足世界杯，希望不要那么离谱。","text_exts":[{"e":63,"s":60,"text":"世界杯","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%E6%9D%AF&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177417870371568983%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227088718783564595999%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227073415273771961380%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%E6%9D%AF%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1650470963,"group_id":"7073415273771961380","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一壶茶，一本书","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw923qYuXMS8PwAmXgkSehI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1e35812072b44aadad11f610a4120740~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710566&x-signature=IGdRxCvNKTQb1wBIfqXwXRWirzQ%3D","user_id":"86324452923","user_name":"拱手让他"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"86324452923","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776517709,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7073415273771961380","book_info":{"abstract":"苏白穿越了！
酷爱足球的他没想到穿越到了2010年！
那一年，C罗和梅西统治足坛的时代才刚刚开始！
而他一开场就点满了传球天赋！
世界第一中场的他，开始制霸五大联赛！
梅西看着场上疯狂的苏白瞪大了双眼！
他被惊呆了！
这世界居然还有如此美轮美奂的传球?
从德甲出道的苏白，成为了全世界最火的新星！
豪门疯了一样的追求苏白.........","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7c03b793d227f197fac46cf7e02ca5c0","author":"超级帅哥","author_id":"","book_id":"7073415273771961380","book_name":"满级传球的我，梅西C罗馋哭了","book_short_name":"大国足球","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#280800","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7073420126531355150","read_count":"67276","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1163690"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"495","tags":"游戏体育,体育,系统,穿越,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a4a7edeba608581b253599e5d70f8b03~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362703&x-signature=O5syvxAlYfvg6UM494qsSTrO6do%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4873079623","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.1640051e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322192503C055E5280AB371568983"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":45,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11639,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":40920},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7123647062658581280","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说实在是太棒了，作者文笔细腻，人物塑造也非常棒，每个人都有自己鲜明的特点。主线故事中穿插着很多有趣的小插曲，让整个故事不会显得单调沉闷，主角的性格也很讨喜，聪明，活泼，重感情，性格果决不圣母。最重要的是主角的金手指，设定的很合理，不像隔壁那么玄幻那么假。这是我心目中最棒的体育类题材的作品，作者加油啊。期待后面的剧情发展。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1658604215,"group_id":"7073415273771961380","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"经常因为过于沙雕而显得与周边环境格格不入…","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/loeQ5zOJw28h5d+rXeOoM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a71a3595b3da45f2982db1794df0a9c3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705936&x-signature=O7%2FULEIKVcKpM1%2Ffos4g3QUFjOg%3D","user_id":"55335091725","user_name":"慕容那个狗蛋儿啊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"55335091725","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"70734
